sn47.4:2.1: Traditionally, new monastics are taught the meditation on parts of the body (MN 10:10.1, Kp 3:1.1). See too AN 5.114.
sn47.4:3.1: Through the practice of mindfulness meditation they have attained jhāna and now seek to deepen understanding.
sn47.4:4.1: The arahants continue to meditate, not in order to achieve anything, but simply because it is a pure and blissful abiding.
